onboarding.step1Title: Welcome to the World Cup Prediction Game!
onboarding.step1Desc: Predict the 2026 World Cup matches, earn points, and compete with your group.
onboarding.step2Desc: Submit or change your prediction any time before kickoff. There are several ways to score.
onboarding.step3Desc: A great call across the tournament — pick once, earn for weeks.
onboarding.step3Bullet2: Their own deadlines (usually World Cup kickoff)
onboarding.step3Bullet3: If you forget, a banner above Matches reminds you
onboarding.step3PendingExample: 3 special predictions still missing · deadline: Jun 21.
onboarding.step4Desc: Pick one favourite team per league in your profile. You earn double points on their matches in the group leaderboard.
onboarding.step4ExampleLeft: 1 correct prediction on your favourite's match
onboarding.step4LockNote: After the league's first match the choice locks — set it early.
onboarding.step5Desc: These are also waiting for you in the menu. You can replay this tutorial any time.
onboarding.step5ReplayHint: 🔁 You can replay the tutorial from the menu any time.
onboarding.hubMatchesDesc: Filter by day, league and team.
onboarding.hubGroupsDesc: Create one or join with an invite code.
onboarding.hubDonationDesc: The game is free — buy me a coffee.

donation.title: Enjoying the game?
donation.desc: This predictor is built as a passion project for the community. If you're having fun, a small contribution helps keep it running.

landing.heroTitle1: Predict the World Cup with your friends.
landing.heroDesc: Predict every match, set your favourite team for double points, and follow live leaderboards across your groups.
landing.howDesc: Sign up, find a group, start predicting — you're competing in minutes.
landing.howStep1Title: Sign up and join a group
landing.howStep1Desc: Create your own group or join an existing one with an invite code.
landing.howStep2Desc: Score, goal margin, or just the winner — each scores points. Special (tournament) predictions earn extra.
landing.howStep3Desc: Points are calculated automatically after each match. Your favourite team's matches earn you double points.
landing.featuresDesc: Predictions, scoring, and competition — with extra twists.
landing.feature1Desc: Create multiple groups for friends, family or coworkers. Each gets its own leaderboard and scoring config.
landing.feature2Desc: Top scorer, group winners, finalists — pick once and earn across the whole tournament.
landing.feature3Desc: Pick one favourite team per league. Every point you earn on their matches counts double.
landing.feature4Desc: Points update within seconds of the final whistle. Live, no manual calculations.
landing.feature5Desc: Forgot to predict? A banner above the matches reminds you before the window closes.
landing.feature6Desc: Per-group standings, live updates. Track your position match by match.
landing.persona1Quote: "Last time we used a spreadsheet. Never again."
landing.persona1Desc: Share an invite code and everyone joins. No app download, no sign-up wall.
landing.persona2Quote: "Instead of a Friday Slack thread, we have a leaderboard now."
landing.persona2Desc: Run a company league without IT support. Email sign-in and you're set.
landing.scoringDesc: You don't have to nail the exact score — picking the right winner still earns points. Your group's admin can customise the values.
landing.scoringDoubleNote: ✨ All values count double on your favourite team's matches in the group leaderboard.
landing.communityText: Create your group, invite your friends, and start predicting.
landing.faq1A: Nothing. Completely free, no hidden fees. Voluntary tips welcome on Ko-fi.
landing.faq2Q: Do I need to download anything?
landing.faq2A: No. It runs in your browser on any device.
landing.faq3Q: How big can a group be?
landing.faq3A: No limit. Works for 5 friends or a 200-person office league.
landing.faq4Q: What if I forget to predict?
landing.faq4A: You get 0 points for that match, but the rest of your predictions still count. The pending banner reminds you before the deadline.
landing.faq5Q: What is the favourite team double points?
landing.faq5A: You can pick one favourite team per league. Every point you earn on their matches counts double in the group leaderboard. The choice locks after the league's first match.
landing.faq6A: Beyond match predictions, you can also predict tournament outcomes — top scorer, group winners, finalists, etc. They have their own deadlines, usually the start of the tournament.
landing.footerCtaDisclaimer: Free forever. No hidden fees. Email + password sign-in.
landing.footerCopyright: © 2025-2026 World Cup Prediction Game. Not affiliated with FIFA.

tournamentTips.title: Tournament Tips
tournamentTips.description: Tournament-wide special tips. Your tip counts for the entire tournament.
tournamentTips.noAccess: Tournament tips are only available if you're a member of a World Cup group. Join or create one to access them.
tournamentTips.empty: No tournament-wide tips yet. They'll show up here as soon as they're available.
tournamentTips.lockedBanner: Deadline passed — your tip is locked.
tournamentTips.tabEmpty: No tips in this category yet.

upsetSpecial.instruction: Pick exactly {max} teams you think will NOT advance from the group stage.

groupStandings.intro: Predict the final standings for all 12 groups (positions 1–4), then pick the 8 best 3rd-placed teams that advance.
groupStandings.infoCard: Predict all 12 group orderings (A–L). You can start with any group. Once all are done, pick your qualifying 3rd-place teams.
groupStandings.best3rdInstruction: Pick {n} teams from the 3rd-placed teams that will advance.
groupStandings.best3rdEmpty: No 3rd-placed teams available — finish the groups first.
groupStandings.best3rdRemaining: You still need to pick {n} more team(s).
groupStandings.best3rdScoringNote: Best 3rd-placed teams have no separate score — Round of 32 progression is scored by the Bracket tip.

bracketProgression.intro: Pick the winner of every match in the knockout bracket.
bracketProgression.infoCard: Pick the winner of each match. Pairings come from your group-standings tip. Winners advance automatically to the next round.
bracketProgression.lockedUpstream: Fill in the previous round first.
bracketProgression.lockedGroupStandings: Fill in the Group Standings tip first.
bracketProgression.gateBody: Fill in the Group Standings tip first — Last 32 pairings are derived from your group orderings + qualifying 3rd-place teams.
bracketProgression.orphanToast: Your group-standings tip changed — {n} winner picks were cleared.
bracketProgression.evaluatedSubtitle: Expand rounds to see which teams you got right.
bracketProgression.bronzeNoScoreTooltip: The bronze medalist pick currently awards zero points.

scoringExplainer.title: Scoring rules
scoringExplainer.subtitleSingle: Rules in effect for this group
scoringExplainer.subtitleMulti: Rules in effect for your groups
scoringExplainer.frozenTooltip: These rules are locked and won't change during the tournament.
scoringExplainer.matchScoringNote: Bonuses stack — a single match can earn more than one.

rules.extraTimeBonus: Extra time / penalty outcome bonus (knockout stage)

tournament.round32: Each team correctly into the round of 32
tournament.round16: Each team correctly into the round of 16
tournament.round8: Each team correctly into the quarterfinals
tournament.round4: Each team correctly into the semifinals
tournament.finalist: Each team correctly into the final

bonus.heading: Bonuses
bonus.favoriteTeamDesc: When you tip your favorite team's match, points earned there ×2.

install.title: Install as an app on your phone
install.subtitle: Add the World Cup Prediction Game to your home screen and use it like a native app — own icon, full screen, faster launch.

promptCta.title: One-tap install
promptCta.description: Your browser supports automatic install — tap the button and confirm in the system dialog.

installed.title: App is already installed
installed.description: You're launching this app from the home screen — nothing more to do.

ios.heading: Install on iOS

steps.hint: Installation will not work from other browsers (Chrome, Firefox) on iOS.

steps.text: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the screen (square with an upward arrow).
Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen.
Rename it if you like, then tap Add in the top-right corner.
Done! A new icon appears on your home screen — launch from there to run the prediction game as an app.

ios.note: If you were signed in inside Safari, you'll need to sign in again the first time you open the app. After that the session sticks.

android.heading: Install on Android
android.requirements: Chrome, Edge, Brave, or Samsung Internet
android.manualHeading: Or do it manually from the browser menu

steps.text: Tap the three-dot menu in the top-right corner.
Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
steps.hint: Some phones show an "Install" banner directly below the address bar — tap that to skip the menu.

steps.text: Confirm with the Install button in the dialog that pops up.
Done! The app appears on your home screen and in the app drawer with its own icon.

android.note: If you don't see the Install option, update your browser to the latest version or try a different one (e.g. Chrome).

benefits.title: What changes after installing?
items: Own icon on the home screen — one tap and you're in.
Faster launch, since the shell is already cached.
Offline base view — even without network, the app opens with a friendly message.
